description: Create a GitLab CI configuration that defines a hidden job/template named .common-ci-tokens which extends the .tokens-for-all-branches, .renovate-gitlab-token, and .grafana-api-token templates, making the combined CI tokens available to all jobs. Ensure the template does not create its own stage or job and is only used for inheritance. Do not add any additional jobs, stages, scripts, or variables beyond this extension.
